entries.description: Flush the offline outbox to the cloud before pulling (encrypting queued note text; remapping notes queued against merged-away books onto the survivor — SUR-463 R3).
Pull all 8 synced tables incrementally by per-table server change_seq cursor (SUR-739/SUR-652) and merge into the local store last-write-wins by updatedAt, stored as ciphertext.
Fetch any book a live note references that the incremental pull did not deliver, so no note renders against a missing book.
Re-home notes left pointing at a book merged away on another device: to the survivor with this device’s merge map, detached without one; push survivor re-homes to the cloud (SUR-463).
Preserve every dropped classical canon leaf still on a note as a user-scoped custom idea and flush the new customs immediately; non-fatal, self-heals next sync (SUR-597).
Download missing note images AND ink crops from cloud storage into device-local dataUrl fields (no updatedAt bump); per-item non-fatal (SUR-524).
Reload all local records with decrypt-on-read so app state holds plaintext; count and report decrypt failures.
Advance each per-table change_seq cursor to the max pulled and persist the legacy lastSyncAt checkpoint; runs only when every prior step succeeded.
Load-time self-heal of missing contentTag fingerprints from decrypted notes + exact-duplicate cluster detection for the merge prompt (SUR-638).
Idempotent dropped-canon-leaf → custom-idea preservation with user-scoped ids; also dispatched as sync step preserve-dropped-tags (SUR-597).
Merge duplicate books: reassign notes to the survivor, soft-delete losers, record the loser→survivor map, null moved notes’ contentTag for re-derivation (SUR-463/SUR-638).
Undo a book merge: restore notes to their original books and re-null their contentTag symmetrically.
Merge duplicate notes: union tags, adopt an image from a loser, re-point note_links edges (deduping self-loops), migrate collection memberships to the survivor (SUR-638).
Move notes off merged-away (soft-deleted) books onto the survivor per the merge map, detaching when no mapping exists; also dispatched as sync step rehome-stranded-notes (SUR-463).
Last-write-wins merge of pulled cloud rows into the local store by updatedAt across all 8 synced tables; ciphertext preserved as-is.
Create a note’s birth signal row if absent (local-only until a behavioural bump syncs it).
Bump a note’s exposure recency signal.
Bump a note’s engagement recency signal.
Record a return visit to a note: bump return-visit count + exposure recency.
Mark a note as annotated (hasAnnotation=true) when a margin child is created.
Reconcile the cached hasAnnotation flag against live note_links edge truth.
Record a stitch spawned from a note: bump stitch-spawn count + engagement recency.
Tombstone a note’s signal row when the note is soft-deleted.
